name: Typewriter & Product Demo
description: Typewriter headline with 2 pill-highlighted words → a REQUIRED full-screen product/app-screen demo (~27% of runtime) → blur-pop final CTA. No logo grid — university crests only appear inside the product demo itself.
previewVideoPath: reference/ireland nvo  18th may - Ireland shortlist 9 by 16.mp4

questions.prompt: First highlighted pill word in the mid-copy line (green pill, e.g. "SHORTLIST")
Second highlighted pill word (red pill, e.g. "60")
Path to this campaign's own app screen-recording (REQUIRED for this format — never a reference clip)
